# alicevision-for-mac

> Apple Silicon Metal port of AliceVision photogrammetry + Meshroom orchestration. CUDA-replaced-by-Metal end-to-end: 12 pipeline binaries (cameraInit through texturing) drive a native `av::gpu` Metal abstraction. End-to-end validated on the Monstree mini3 dataset (3 photos â†’ textured 3D mesh). Includes a native SwiftUI Meshroom replacement at `meshroom-native/` (115 Swift tests passing, byte-identical UID hashing for Meshroom-Python interop) and a Python Meshroom integration path via `scripts/run_meshroom.sh`. ctest: 37/37 sequential. Release tarball staged at `build/release/`.

## Documentation
- [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md): codebase tour â€” `av::gpu` + `av::depth_map` layering, upstream overlay model
- [BUILD.md](BUILD.md): build prerequisites (macOS 14+, Xcode 26+, Homebrew), CMake invocation
- [INSTALL_macOS.md](INSTALL_macOS.md): user-facing install guide and known limitations
- [PORTING_NOTES.md](PORTING_NOTES.md): CUDA â†’ Metal design log (FP64â†’FP32, UMA, mangling, shim policy)
- [RELEASE.md](RELEASE.md): how to cut the redistributable tarball (`ninja package`)

## Code overview
- [src/](src/): native Metal sources â€” `av::gpu` abstraction, `av::depth_map` kernels, upstream adapter
- [src/depth_map_metal/src/upstream_adapter.cpp](src/depth_map_metal/src/upstream_adapter.cpp): the CUDA-shim â†’ Metal-kernel forwarder (12 `cuda_*` entrypoints)
- [cmake/shims/aliceVision-includes/](cmake/shims/aliceVision-includes/): header shims that replace CUDA-using upstream headers
- [cmake/shims/cuda-stubs/](cmake/shims/cuda-stubs/): CUDA-host-API typedef shims (`__half`, `float2`, `cudaStream_t`, â€¦)
- [third_party/lemon/](third_party/lemon/): vendored LEMON 1.3.1 graph library (Homebrew's `lemon` is unrelated)
- [third_party/metal-cpp/](third_party/metal-cpp/): vendored Apple metal-cpp headers
- [tests/](tests/): 38 ctest files â€” kernel correctness, end-to-end pipeline, shim conformance
- [meshroom-native/](meshroom-native/): native SwiftUI Meshroom â€” `ProjectModel` + `App` modules, 115 tests
- [meshroom-native/Sources/App/NodeUIDHasher.swift](meshroom-native/Sources/App/NodeUIDHasher.swift): byte-identical Meshroom-compatible UID hashing
- [build/release/alicevision-for-mac-0.1.0-arm64.tar.gz](build/release/alicevision-for-mac-0.1.0-arm64.tar.gz): 15.4 MB release tarball (12 binaries + `default.metallib` + `share/aliceVision/`)
- [scripts/run_meshroom.sh](scripts/run_meshroom.sh): drives Python Meshroom against our Apple Silicon binaries
- [dataset_monstree/](dataset_monstree/): end-to-end smoke dataset (mini3, mini6, full variants)
- [CMakeLists.txt](CMakeLists.txt): root build with Homebrew prefix wiring + `AV_BUILD_UPSTREAM_DEPTHMAP` switch

## Pipeline binaries (`build/release/alicevision-for-mac-0.1.0/bin/`)
- `aliceVision_cameraInit`, `aliceVision_featureExtraction`, `aliceVision_imageMatching`, `aliceVision_featureMatching`, `aliceVision_incrementalSfM`, `aliceVision_prepareDenseScene`, `aliceVision_depthMapEstimation`, `aliceVision_depthMapFiltering`, `aliceVision_meshing`, `aliceVision_meshFiltering`, `aliceVision_texturing`, `aliceVision_importMiddlebury`, plus `default.metallib`

## Engineering memory (`memory/`)
- [memory/session_start.md](memory/session_start.md): start here every session â€” current priorities + reading order
- [memory/philosophy.md](memory/philosophy.md): engineering bedrock (UMA-first, no shallow fixes, Metal-native preferred)
- [memory/project_context.md](memory/project_context.md): what/why/goals/constraints
- [memory/mindmap.md](memory/mindmap.md): repo structure, CUDA-surface map, validated learnings
- [memory/todo.md](memory/todo.md): phase status (Phases 0â€“15 complete, S47)
- [memory/handover_session.md](memory/handover_session.md): per-session log
- [memory/phase8_adapter_map.md](memory/phase8_adapter_map.md): adapter-by-adapter audit
- [memory/phase11_meshroom_integration.md](memory/phase11_meshroom_integration.md): Meshroom-Python plumbing notes

- [memory/perf_optimization_s45.md](memory/perf_optimization_s45.md): R2+R3 perf optimizations (cumulative -18.5%)

- [memory/agent_profile.md](memory/agent_profile.md): how the AI agent operates on this repo
